description: CompositionPeach blouson short jacket made of 100% polyester, with zippered closure, insert pockets on the sides with lace trim, elasticated hems and ruffled neckline FittingRegularWash care Warm delicate machine wash Wash garment inside out Wash with similar colours Do not belach Do not tumble dry Line dry in shade Cool iron on reverse side Professionally dry cleanable Take feminine dressing to the next level in this peach blouson jacket from forever new. The ruffled neckline, lace trims, blouson silhouette  and the soft colouring of the jacket gives a distinctively sweet look. Layer this with white tunic tops, skinny jeans or cream tights and silver ballerina flats for a spring look.Model statisticsThe model wears size MHeight-5.8", Chest-33"
